Google Pics is an image creation and editing app built on Google’s Nano Banana model.

Google Pics is available first to Trusted Testers, with a wider summer rollout planned for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers and Workspace business previews."},{"url":"https://pulse2.com/google-workspace-new-ai-features-add-voice-tools-image-creation-and-personal-ai-agent/","title":"Google Workspace: New AI Features Add Voice Tools, Image Creation And Personal AI Agent","content":"In Gmail, a feature called Gmail Live enables users to search their inbox using voice commands.
Workspace integrations, initially launching with Slides and Drive.

Search, Gmail, Docs, YouTube, Wallet, Android, Chrome, Workspace, the more of your life that sits there, the more magical Gemini can feel.

The updates were announced on May 19, 2026, at Google I/O and apply to Google AI subscribers and Google Workspace business customers. The new voice features will roll out to Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers, and in preview to Google Workspace business customers, this summer. Google Pics has launched to a limited group of Trusted Testers and is set to roll out globally this summer to Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers, and in preview for Google Workspace business customers.","score":0.8815438,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://mashable.com/article/new-google-workspace-features-google-io-2026","title":"All the new features coming to Google Workspace, announced at Google I/O 2026 | Mashable","content":"# At Google I/O, three new features coming to Google Workspace: Voice capabilities, Google Pics, and AI Inbox. At Google I/O, three new features are coming to Google Workspace. At a glance, new features coming to Workplace include Gmail Live, Docs Live, Google Pics, and AI Inbox. Google Pics is the latest AI image editing and generation tool built on Google's Nano Banana platform. Here's everything you need to know about the new features for Google Workspace announced at Google I/O 2026. No typing necessary: Start dictating in Docs Live and Google's AI will do the rest. When you're on the go and don't have a moment to type out or search for what you need, Google's new voice capabilities provide answers faster. Now with Gmail Live, you can ask your most important questions like \"What's my flight info?\" and get the answer in a moment, rather than sifting through your bursting inbox. Now announced at Google I/O, AI Inbox is rolling out to AI Pro and Plus users.","score":0.87706697,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/workspace-updates","title":"New ways to create and get stuff done in Google Workspace","content":"New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace.
